serial_overscan_bbox.description: Bounding box of the serial (horizontal) overscan region in the raw image.
serial_overscan_bbox.title: _SerializedBox

x_offset.description: X offset between the raw position of this amplifier and the trimmed, assembled position of the amplifier.

y_offset.description: Y offset between the raw position of this amplifier and the trimmed, assembled position of the amplifier.

ApertureCorrectionMapSerializationModel.description:
Serialization model for aperture correction maps.

Notes
-----
The in-memory aperture correction map type is just a `dict` from `str`
to `~.fields.BaseField`, so the `serialize` and `deserialize` methods are
defined here.

CellGrid.description:
A grid of rectangular cells with no overlaps or space between cells.

Notes
-----
A cell grid usually corresponds to a full patch, but we do not explicitly
encode this in the type to permit full-tract grids, which would have to
drop the cells in patch overlap regions and re-label all cells.

Subsets of grids are usually represented via `CellGridBounds`.

bbox.description: Bounding box of the grid of cells (snapped to cell boundaries. The cell with index (i=0, j=0) always has a corner at ``(y=bbox.y.min, x=bbox.x.min)`` but there is no expectation that ``(y=bbox.y.min, x=bbox.x.min)`` be ``(y=0, x=0)``.
bbox.title: _SerializedBox

cell_shape.description: Shape of each cell in pixels.

CellGrid.title: CellGrid

CellGridBounds.description:
A region of pixels defined by a set of cells within a grid.

Notes
-----
This data structure is optimized for the case where a continguous
rectangular region of the grid (the `bbox` attribute) is populated with
only a few exceptions (the `missing` set).

Slicing a `CellGridBounds` with a `.Box` returns a new `CellGridBounds`
with just the cells that overlap that box.  As always,
`CellGridBounds.bbox` will be snapped to the outer boundaries of those
cells, so it will contain (and not generally equal) the given box.

bbox.description: Pixel bounding box of the region (snapped to cell boundaries).
bbox.title: _SerializedBox

grid.description: Definition of the grid that defines the cells.

missing.description: Indices of cells that are missing, where (i=0, j=0) is the cell that starts at grid.bbox.start.
missing.title: Missing

CellGridBounds.title: CellGridBounds

CellIJ.description:
An index in a grid of cells.

Notes
-----
This is deliberately not a `tuple` or other `~collections.abc.Sequence` in
order to make it typing-incompatible with sequence-based pixel coordinate
pairs (e.g. `.YX`).  This also allows it to have addition and subtraction
operators.
CellIJ.title: CellIJ

bounds.description: The region where this field can be evaluated. The bbox of this region is grown by half a pixel on all sides and then used to remap coordinates to [-1, 1]x[-1, 1], which is the natural domain of a 2-d Chebyshev polynomial.

butler_info.description: Information about the butler dataset backed by this file.

coefficients.description: Coefficients for a 2-d Chebyshev polynomial of the first kind, as a 2-d matrix in which element [p, q] corresponds to the coefficient of T_p(y) T_q(x).

indirect.description: Serialized nested objects that may be saved or read more than once.
indirect.title: Indirect

min_read_version.title: Min Read Version

schema_version.description: Data-model schema version of this tree (major.minor.patch).
schema_version.title: Schema Version

A coordinate frame for a particular detector's pixels.

This frame is only used for post-assembly images (i.e. not those with
overscan regions still present).

FieldAngleFrame.description:
An angular coordinate frame that maps a camera onto the sky about its
boresight.

Notes
-----
The transform between a `FocalPlaneFrame` and a `FieldAngleFrame` includes
optical distortions but no rotation.  It may include a parity flip.

visit.description: ID of the visit.  May be unset in contexts where there is no visit or only a relevant single visit.
visit.title: Visit

visit.title: Visit

NumberType.description: Enumeration of array values types supported by the library.
NumberType.title: NumberType

_translator.description: Name of the registered metadata translator class used for these data.
_translator.title: Translator

altaz_begin.description: Telescope boresight azimuth and elevation at start of observation. Serialized as an (azimuth, altitude) tuple of floats in degrees.
altaz_begin.title: Altaz Begin

altaz_end.description: Telescope boresight azimuth and elevation at end of observation. Serialized as an (azimuth, altitude) tuple of floats in degrees.
altaz_end.title: Altaz End

boresight_airmass.description: Airmass of the boresight of the telescope.
boresight_airmass.title: Boresight Airmass

boresight_rotation_angle.description: Angle of the instrument in boresight_rotation_coord frame. Serialized as a float in degrees.
boresight_rotation_angle.title: Boresight Rotation Angle

boresight_rotation_coord.description: Coordinate frame of the instrument rotation angle (options: sky, unknown).
boresight_rotation_coord.title: Boresight Rotation Coord

can_see_sky.description: True if the observation is looking at sky, False if it is definitely not looking at the sky. None indicates that it is not known whether sky could be seen.
can_see_sky.title: Can See Sky

dark_time.description: Duration of the exposure with shutter closed (seconds).
dark_time.title: Dark Time

datetime_begin.description: Time of the start of the observation. Serialized as a two-element TAI Julian Date [jd1, jd2].
datetime_begin.title: Datetime Begin

datetime_end.description: Time of the end of the observation. Serialized as a two-element TAI Julian Date [jd1, jd2].
datetime_end.title: Datetime End

detector_exposure_id.description: Unique integer identifier for this detector in this exposure.
detector_exposure_id.title: Detector Exposure Id

detector_group.description: Collection name of which this detector is a part. Can be None if there are no detector groupings.
detector_group.title: Detector Group

detector_name.description: Name of the detector within the instrument (might not be unique if there are detector groups).
detector_name.title: Detector Name

detector_num.description: Unique (for instrument) integer identifier for the sensor.
detector_num.title: Detector Num

detector_serial.description: Serial number/string associated with this detector.
detector_serial.title: Detector Serial

detector_unique_name.description: Unique name of the detector within the focal plane, generally combining detector_group with detector_name.
detector_unique_name.title: Detector Unique Name

exposure_group.description: Label to use to associate this exposure with others (can be related to 'exposure_id').
exposure_group.title: Exposure Group

exposure_id.description: Unique (with instrument) integer identifier for this observation.
exposure_id.title: Exposure Id

focus_z.description: Defocal distance. Serialized as a float in meters.
focus_z.title: Focus Z

group_counter_end.description: Observation counter for the end of the exposure group. Depending on the instrument the relevant group may be visit_id or exposure_group.
group_counter_end.title: Group Counter End

group_counter_start.description: Observation counter for the start of the exposure group.Depending on the instrument the relevant group may be visit_id or exposure_group.
group_counter_start.title: Group Counter Start

has_simulated_content.description: Boolean indicating whether any part of this observation was simulated.
has_simulated_content.title: Has Simulated Content

instrument.description: The instrument used to observe the exposure.
instrument.title: Instrument

location.description: Location of the observatory. Serialized as a geocentric (x, y, z) tuple of floats in meters.
location.title: Location

object.description: Object of interest or field name.
object.title: Object

observation_counter.description: Counter of this observation. Can be counter within observing_day or a global counter. Likely to be observatory specific.
observation_counter.title: Observation Counter

observation_id.description: Label uniquely identifying this observation (can be related to 'exposure_id').
observation_id.title: Observation Id

observation_reason.description: Reason this observation was taken, or its purpose ('science' and 'calibration' are common values)
observation_reason.title: Observation Reason

observation_type.description: Type of observation (currently: science, dark, flat, bias, focus).
observation_type.title: Observation Type

observing_day.description: Integer in YYYYMMDD format corresponding to the day of observation.
observing_day.title: Observing Day

observing_day_offset.description: Offset to subtract from an observation date when calculating the observing day. Conversely, the offset to add to an observing day when calculating the time span of a day. Serialized as integer seconds.
observing_day_offset.title: Observing Day Offset

physical_filter.description: The bandpass filter used for this observation.
physical_filter.title: Physical Filter

pressure.description: Atmospheric pressure outside the dome. Serialized as a float in hPa.
pressure.title: Pressure

temperature.description: Temperature outside the dome. Serialized as a float in kelvin.
temperature.title: Temperature

tracking_radec.description: Requested RA/Dec to track. Serialized as an ICRS (RA, Dec) tuple of floats in degrees.
tracking_radec.title: Tracking Radec

visit_id.description:
ID of the Visit this Exposure is associated with.

Science observations should essentially always be
associated with a visit, but calibration observations
may not be.
visit_id.title: Visit Id

centroidDiffShapeletsVsSlotMedian.description: Median centroid difference (sqrt((slot_x - shapelet_x)**2 + (slot_y - shapelet_y)**2)) for sources used in the shapelet decomposition (pixels).
centroidDiffShapeletsVsSlotMedian.title: Centroiddiffshapeletsvsslotmedian

effTime.description: Effective exposure time calculated from psfSigma, skyBg, and zeroPoint (seconds).
effTime.title: Efftime

effTimePsfSigmaScale.description: PSF scaling of the effective exposure time.
effTimePsfSigmaScale.title: Efftimepsfsigmascale

effTimeSkyBgScale.description: Sky background scaling of the effective exposure time.
effTimeSkyBgScale.title: Efftimeskybgscale

effTimeZeroPointScale.description: Zeropoint scaling of the effective exposure time.
effTimeZeroPointScale.title: Efftimezeropointscale

magLim.description: Magnitude limit at fixed SNR (default SNR=5) calculated from psfSigma, skyBg, zeroPoint, and readNoise.
magLim.title: Maglim

maxDistToNearestPsf.description: Maximum distance of an unmasked pixel to its nearest model psf star (pixels).
maxDistToNearestPsf.title: Maxdisttonearestpsf

meanVar.description: Mean variance of the weight plane (ADU**2).
meanVar.title: Meanvar

nPsfStar.description: Number of stars used for psf model.
nPsfStar.title: Npsfstar

nShapeletsStar.description: Number of sources used in the shapelet decomposition.
nShapeletsStar.title: Nshapeletsstar

psfAdaptiveIncludeThresholdMultiplier.description: Threshold multiplier used in the adaptive threshold detection pass for PSF modelling.
psfAdaptiveIncludeThresholdMultiplier.title: Psfadaptiveincludethresholdmultiplier

psfAdaptiveThresholdValue.description: Threshold value used in the adaptive threshold detection pass for PSF modelling.
psfAdaptiveThresholdValue.title: Psfadaptivethresholdvalue

psfApCorrSigmaScaledDelta.description: Delta (max - min) of the psf flux aperture correction factors scaled (divided) by the psfSigma evaluated on a grid of unmasked pixels.
psfApCorrSigmaScaledDelta.title: Psfapcorrsigmascaleddelta

psfApFluxDelta.description: Delta (max - min) of the model psf aperture flux (with aperture radius of max(2, 3*psfSigma)) values evaluated on a grid of unmasked pixels.
psfApFluxDelta.title: Psfapfluxdelta

psfStarDeltaE1Median.description: Psf stars median E1 residual (starE1 - psfE1).
psfStarDeltaE1Median.title: Psfstardeltae1Median

psfStarDeltaE1Scatter.description: Psf stars MAD E1 scatter (starE1 - psfE1).
psfStarDeltaE1Scatter.title: Psfstardeltae1Scatter

psfStarDeltaE2Median.description: Psf stars median E2 residual (starE2 - psfE2).
psfStarDeltaE2Median.title: Psfstardeltae2Median

psfStarDeltaE2Scatter.description: Psf stars MAD E2 scatter (starE2 - psfE2).
psfStarDeltaE2Scatter.title: Psfstardeltae2Scatter

psfStarDeltaSizeMedian.description: Psf stars median size residual (starSize - psfSize).
psfStarDeltaSizeMedian.title: Psfstardeltasizemedian

psfStarDeltaSizeScatter.description: Psf stars MAD size scatter (starSize - psfSize).
psfStarDeltaSizeScatter.title: Psfstardeltasizescatter

psfStarScaledDeltaSizeScatter.description: Psf stars MAD size scatter scaled by psfSize**2.
psfStarScaledDeltaSizeScatter.title: Psfstarscaleddeltasizescatter

psfTE1e1.description: Per-exposure TE1e1 ~ <de1 de1> of PSF residual ellipticity, averaged over theta [0,1] arcmin via treecorr KK correlation. Dimensionless; used to form the full-survey TE1 metric.
psfTE1e1.title: Psfte1E1

psfTE1e2.description: Per-exposure TE1e2 ~ <de2 de2> of PSF residual ellipticity, averaged over theta [0,1] arcmin via treecorr KK correlation. Dimensionless; used to form the full-survey TE1 metric.
psfTE1e2.title: Psfte1E2

psfTE1ex.description: Per-exposure TE1ex ~ <de1 de2> of PSF residual ellipticity, averaged over theta [0,1] arcmin via treecorr KK correlation. Dimensionless; used to form the full-survey TE1 metric.
psfTE1ex.title: Psfte1Ex

psfTE2e1.description: Per-exposure TE2e1 ~ <de1 de1> of PSF residual ellipticity, averaged over theta [5,100] arcmin via treecorr KK correlation. Dimensionless; used to form the full-survey TE2 metric.
psfTE2e1.title: Psfte2E1

psfTE2e2.description: Per-exposure TE2e2 ~ <de2 de2> of PSF residual ellipticity, averaged over theta [5,100] arcmin via treecorr KK correlation. Dimensionless; used to form the full-survey TE2 metric.
psfTE2e2.title: Psfte2E2

psfTE2ex.description: Per-exposure TE2ex ~ <de1 de2> of PSF residual ellipticity, averaged over theta [5,100] arcmin via treecorr KK correlation. Dimensionless; used to form the full-survey TE2 metric.
psfTE2ex.title: Psfte2Ex

psfTE3e1.description: Per-exposure median-over-CCDs of TE3e1 ~ <de1 de1> of PSF residual ellipticity, where each CCD uses theta within [0,5] arcmin bins. Dimensionless; downstream pipelines take the 85th percentile over images to evaluate TE3.
psfTE3e1.title: Psfte3E1

psfTE3e2.description: Per-exposure median-over-CCDs of TE3e2 ~ <de2 de2> of PSF residual ellipticity, where each CCD uses theta within [0,5] arcmin bins. Dimensionless; downstream pipelines take the 85th percentile over images to evaluate TE3.
psfTE3e2.title: Psfte3E2

psfTE3ex.description: Per-exposure median-over-CCDs of TE3ex ~ <de1 de2> of PSF residual ellipticity, where each CCD uses theta within [0,5] arcmin bins. Dimensionless; downstream pipelines take the 85th percentile over images to evaluate TE3.
psfTE3ex.title: Psfte3Ex

psfTE4e1.description: Per-exposure median-over-CCDs of TE4e1 ~ <de1 de1> of PSF residual ellipticity, where each CCD uses theta within [5,20] arcmin bins. Dimensionless; downstream pipelines take the 85th percentile over images to evaluate TE4.
psfTE4e1.title: Psfte4E1

psfTE4e2.description: Per-exposure median-over-CCDs of TE4e2 ~ <de2 de2> of PSF residual ellipticity, where each CCD uses theta within [5,20] arcmin bins. Dimensionless; downstream pipelines take the 85th percentile over images to evaluate TE4.
psfTE4e2.title: Psfte4E2

psfTE4ex.description: Per-exposure median-over-CCDs of TE4ex ~ <de1 de2> of PSF residual ellipticity, where each CCD uses theta within [5,20] arcmin bins. Dimensionless; downstream pipelines take the 85th percentile over images to evaluate TE4.
psfTE4ex.title: Psfte4Ex

psfTraceRadiusDelta.description: Delta (max - min) of the model psf trace radius values evaluated on a grid of unmasked pixels (pixels).
psfTraceRadiusDelta.title: Psftraceradiusdelta

raCorners.description: Right Ascension of bounding box corners (degrees).
raCorners.title: Racorners

refCatSourceDensity.description: Source density for the detector region as computed from the loaded reference catalog (number per degrees**2).
refCatSourceDensity.title: Refcatsourcedensity

shapeletsCoeffs.description: Coefficients from the PSF star shapelet decomposition.
shapeletsCoeffs.title: Shapeletscoeffs

shapeletsIqScore.description: The dimensionless image quality score as determined from the shapelets decomposition that includes power from the median centroid offset between those used in the decomposition and those of the centroid slot in addition to non-atmospheric decomposition coefficients. The score spans the range [0.0, 1.0] with lower values indicating better image quality.
shapeletsIqScore.title: Shapeletsiqscore

shapeletsOnlyIqScore.description: The dimensionless image quality score as determined from the shapelets decomposition that includes power only from the non-atmospheric decomposition coefficients. The score spans the range [0.0, 1.0] with lower values indicating better image quality.
shapeletsOnlyIqScore.title: Shapeletsonlyiqscore

shapeletsStarEMedian.description: Median ellipticity (sqrt(starE1**2.0 + starE2**2.0)) of the sources used in the shapelet decomposition.
shapeletsStarEMedian.title: Shapeletsstaremedian

shapeletsStarUnNormalizedEMedian.description: Median un-normalized ellipticity (sqrt((starXX - starYY)**2.0 + (2.0*starXY)**2.0)) of the sources used in the shapelet decomposition (pixel**2).
shapeletsStarUnNormalizedEMedian.title: Shapeletsstarunnormalizedemedian

starComa1Median.description: Coma-like higher-order moment combination: median M30 + M12 of the stars used in the PSF model.
starComa1Median.title: Starcoma1Median

starComa2Median.description: Coma-like higher-order moment combination: median M21 + M03 of the stars used in the PSF model.
starComa2Median.title: Starcoma2Median

starE41Median.description: Fourth-order ellipticity-like higher-order moment combination: median M40 - M04 of the stars used in the PSF model.
starE41Median.title: Stare41Median

starE42Median.description: Fourth-order ellipticity-like higher-order moment combination: median 2*(M31 + M13) of the stars used in the PSF model.
starE42Median.title: Stare42Median

starEMedian.description: Median ellipticity (sqrt(starE1**2.0 + starE2**2.0)) of the stars used in the PSF model.
starEMedian.title: Staremedian

starKurtosisMedian.description: Kurtosis-like higher-order moment combination: median M40 + 2*M22 + M04 of the stars used in the PSF model.
starKurtosisMedian.title: Starkurtosismedian

starTrefoil1Median.description: Trefoil-like higher-order moment combination: median M30 - 3*M12 of the stars used in the PSF model.
starTrefoil1Median.title: Startrefoil1Median

starTrefoil2Median.description: Trefoil-like higher-order moment combination: median 3*M21 - M03 of the stars used in the PSF model.
starTrefoil2Median.title: Startrefoil2Median

starUnNormalizedEMedian.description: Median un-normalized ellipticity (sqrt((starXX - starYY)**2.0 + (2.0*starXY)**2.0)) of the stars used in the PSF model.

Orientation.description:

List of the bounds of the ``frames`` for this transform.

This always has the same number of elements as ``frames``.
bounds.title: Bounds

frames.description:
List of frames that this transform passes through.

All transforms include at least two frames (the endpoints).  Others
intermediate frames may be included to facilitate data-sharing
between transforms.
frames.title: Frames

indirect.title: Indirect

mappings.description:
The actual mappings between frames, or archive pointers to
serialized FrameSet objects from which they can be obtained.

This always has one fewer element than ``frames``.
